description: A photograph depicting a dense urban fabric scene in Stockholm, Sweden, intended as an example for classification purposes. The image shows a paved asphalt road in the foreground, flanked by grassy verges and trees. In the middle ground, there are more trees and a low-rise building on the left. Several multi-story residential apartment buildings are visible in the background, characterised by their reddish-brown and yellowish-brown facades. The scene is illuminated by natural daylight under a clear blue sky. This photograph illustrates "Dense urban fabric" as defined by an Imperviousness Density (IM.D) ranging from 30% to 80%.
